PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'COMMAND=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r .command 2>/dev/null); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q "git commit"; then git diff --cached --diff-filter=ACM -z --name-only 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 grep -lE "sk-ant-(oat|ort)01-|security unlock-keychain -p [a-zA-Z]|CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN=sk-" 2>/dev/null && echo "BLOCKED: staged files contain secrets" && exit 2; fi; exit 0'
PreToolUse.description: Block git commits containing OAuth tokens or keychain passwords
